form.formComment: Recent form below what she is capable of. Last start was well back in the run when 7th (Sr1) over 1177m at Pinjarra beaten 14 m by Major Dalton (1:23.60) in 4yo+ NR up to 55 on April 6 at $20. The run previous 5th (Sr2) over 1177m at Pinjarra beaten 15 m by Swanbourne Spunk (1:22.40) in NR up to 55 on March 30 at $10. Worth another chance. Leading player.
